title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
